samples.xml_description:
<module id="traffic_light">
    <description>Implement a traffic light with red, yellow, green indicators and a pedestrian button. In normal traffic light operation, the east-west (EW) cycle is 60 clock cycles of green, 5 clock cycles of yellow, 10 clock cycles of red, and the north-south (NS) cycle is 10 clock cycles of green, 5 clock cycles of yellow, 60 clock cycles of red. When the pedestrian button is pressed, if the remaining EW green time is greater than 10 clocks, it is shortened to 10 clocks. If the remaining EW green time is less than 10 clocks, it is not changed. The east-west and north-south lights are paired. When the EW light is green or yellow, the NS light is red. When the EW light is red, the NS light is green.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="pass_request">Pedestrian button input.</input>
        <output id="red">Red output signal.</output>
        <output id="yellow">Yellow output signal.</output>
        <output id="green">Green output signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum name="idle">Idle state.</enum>
        <enum name="s1_red">State 1 red.</enum>
        <enum name="s2_yellow">State 2 yellow.</enum>
        <enum name="s3_green">State 3 green.</enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="cnt" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit counter.</reg>
            <reg id="state" width_description="[1:0]">2-bit state.</reg>
            <reg id="p_red">1-bit pedestrian red.</reg>
            <reg id="p_yellow">1-bit pedestrian yellow.</reg>
            <reg id="p_green">1-bit pedestrian green.</reg>
            <always>
                <case>
                    <if expr="state==idle">Idle state.</if>
                    <if expr="state==s1_red">State 1 red.</if>
                    <if expr="state==s2_yellow">State 2 yellow.</if>
                    <if expr="state==s3_green">State 3 green.</if>
                </case>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic>
            <if expr="!rst_n">Reset logic.</if>
            <else>
                <if expr="pass_request && green">Pedestrian request logic.</if>
                <else>
                    <if expr="!green && p_green">Green transition logic.</if>
                    <else>
                        <if expr="!yellow && p_yellow">Yellow transition logic.</if>
                        <else>
                            <if expr="!red && p_red">Red transition logic.</if>
                        </else>
                    </else>
                </else>
            </else>
        </sequential_logic>
        <always>
            <assign id="clock">cnt.</assign>
        </always>
        <always>
            <case>
                <if expr="red">Red output logic.</if>
                <if expr="yellow">Yellow output logic.</if>
                <if expr="green">Green output logic.</if>
            </case>
        </always>
    </logic_description>
</module>
